rows.notes: Page title centered and fully legible: 'Special Funds' in large script.
Centered account heading directly under page title; text clear.
Left-column receipt entry. Pounds (364) and shillings (2) align with the vertical ruling; pence column blank. Description legible but the proper name 'Rotheridge' is slightly uncertain (handwritten).
Small duplicated amount in left column under receipts (appears to be the carried/total receipt amount for the Library Account). Amount alignment clear; description area blank on page.
Right-column payment entry clearly written and aligned: 42 pounds, 14 shillings, 4 pence. All currency values within valid ranges and clearly legible.
Right-column payment. '60' is clearly written in the pounds column; shillings/pence positions are blank/zero. Description legible.
Right-column payment entry clearly showing 31 pounds, 19 shillings, 4 pence; columns and digits cleanly written.
Right-column payment. Description and amount (229/8/4) match and align with ruling lines; legible though abbreviated 'etc.' present.
Total/payments line for Library Account: sums of the right-column payments align to 364 pounds 2 shillings 0 pence (matches left receipts). Horizontal rule above confirms this is the section total.
Centered account heading 'Pension Fund' clearly written and distinct from surrounding text.
Left-column receipt line clear: 722/4/3. Description legible and aligns with the left pounds/shillings/pence columns.
Left-column receipt amount (2102/7/6) is clear. The description is partly ambiguous in handwriting ('Shielington Living' is a best-effort reading); I assigned a moderate confidence for the text.
Left-column receipt shows '200' in the pounds column; shillings/pence blank. The description 'From Trustees Funds' is readable but somewhat faint.
Left-column subtotal for Pension Fund clearly written as 3024/11/9. Vertical ruling alignment is clear and values are in valid ranges.

rows.description: Purchase of Consols (note: date '4th Dec' follows)
rows.notes: Right-column payment: the largest payment is fairly legible (2101/17/7) and appears to be for purchase of 'Consols' with a date appended. The word 'Consols' is inferred from cursive; description uncertain.
Small right-column payment; the pounds (11) and shillings (7) somewhat legible but the pence digit is faint and could be different. Description is abbreviated and handwritten small; low confidence.

Another right-column payment showing a round-looking '900' in the pounds column. Shillings/pence blank/zero. The description repeats 'Purchase of Consols' by proximity but the handwriting is not perfectly clear.

There is a very short final right-line for the Pension Fund that appears to be a closing balance. The numeric figures are extremely faint/smudged in the scan; unable to confidently read pounds/shillings/pence here, so left blank.
Centered account heading (long phrase) reasonably legible; I read it as 'Local Rates Composition Fund'.
Left-column receipt line. Pounds (8)/shillings (17)/pence (6) align well; description contains parenthetical text '(Reserve acct)' which is readable though small.
Left-column receipt 'Rent' with amount 37/9/7 clearly placed in pounds/shillings/pence columns.
Left-column small receipt; the pence '1' is faint but sits clearly in the pence column. Shillings shown as zero.
Left-column balance carried forward: 97/10/11 is clearly aligned and readable.
Left total for the Local Rates Composition receipts: 152/18/0 is clearly written beneath a short rule.
Right-column line mirrors the left total as closing balance; digits align clearly with right-hand columns.
Centered heading 'Tuition Fund' clear and distinct.
Left-column receipt shows '2722' in pounds and '14' in shillings; pence column appears blank. Description legible.
Left-column smaller receipt. The trio 14/15/5 is readable though digits are smaller; fits column alignment.
Left total labelled 'Total Receipts' clearly shows 2737/9/5; vertical lines align and values are consistent with above receipts.
Left 'Balance at beginning of year' is legible as 70/16/2 and placed under the receipts section.
Aggregate total for the Tuition receipts side (2737/9/5 + 70/16/2) shown as 2808/5/7; clear and aligns with ruling lines.
Right-column payment entry clearly legible as 2146/13/4 and explicitly annotated '(being Fellows)'.
Right-column payment 'do (not being Fellows)' is clearly written; amounts read as 277/4/6 in respective columns.
Right payment entry readable as 23/13/6 though the pence digit is a little faded; description legible.
Right payment 'Gas &c' with amount appearing as 29/15/5; digits legible but handwriting slightly compressed.
Right payment showing 150 in pounds column; shillings/pence blank. The description is cursive and read as 'Sub Rector' (moderate uncertainty).
Right payment amount 12/1/10 is visible though the small pence '10' is a little squeezed; description 'Stationery' inferred from script.
Right payment legibly reads '200' in pounds and aligns with descriptive text 'Transfer to Pension Fund'.
Right payment 'Investment' is clearly 500 pounds (round), shillings/pence blank.
Right-column total is written as 3339/5/7 and stands out as the payments total for the Tuition Fund; digits align with vertical ruling.
Right final balance for Tuition Fund reads 1044/5/7; this is legible but sits close to fold and some ink fade reduces confidence slightly.
Centered heading 'Exhibition Fund' clear.
Left-column receipt 201/6/8 is clearly written and description 'From Corporate Revenues' is legible.
Left-column beginning balance 26/6/8 reads clearly beneath the revenue line.
Left total (sum of the two left receipts) clearly written as 227/13/4 and aligns with a small rule.
Right-column payment 'Paid to Exhibitions' clearly shows 205/13/4; alignment and digits clear.
Right closing balance appears to be 22/0/0 (227/13/4 minus 205/13/4 equals 22/0/0). The numeric digits on the right are faint but arithmetically consistent with the left total.
Centered heading clear though slightly smaller script; reads 'Undergraduate Reading Room Fund'.
Left receipt 'By Subscriptions' shows '44' in pounds and '8' in shillings; pence column appears blank/faint. Slight uncertainty on shilling digit (looks like '8').
Left 'Balance at beginning of year' shows 41/8 and pence column blank; digits faint but readable in context.

There is a small mark/line under the left receipts with '41/8' repeated; the alignment is ambiguous (could be a carried figure). I recorded it but confidence is low because the scan crops the lower-left of the section.
Right-column small payment/receipt: reads 29/5/6 and aligns clearly with the right-hand pounds/shillings/pence columns. 'Sundry' is readable though abbreviated.
Right closing balance appears to be 12/2/6 (visually consistent with left sums minus the sundry), but digits are close to the page margin/curl and somewhat faded; moderate-to-low confidence.
